name: rust-best-practices
description: Repository-aware workflows for designing, reviewing, testing, documenting, and maintaining production Rust systems.

interface.shortDescription: Design, review, and maintain repository-aware Rust systems.
interface.longDescription: Repository-aware workflows for designing, reviewing, testing, documenting, and maintaining production Rust systems.
defaultPrompt: Use $rust-core-best-practices to review this Rust change against repository policy and current core practices.
Use $rust-project-architecture to design or review this Rust project's crate, module, and workspace boundaries.
Use $rust-testing-strategy to plan reliable unit, integration, doctest, CLI, and end-to-end coverage.
Use $rust-networking to design or review safe Rust clients, retries, timeouts, and pools.
